transcript.content: [GC-D2] 回到编辑器问题。我现在默认编辑器是什么？
Zed。 重跑 `GC-D2` 之后，修复是生效的：
继续之后，第 3 个点也已经基本收住了。 现在状态是：
直接给你一条最短回归命令，方便你以后自己 spot check。
最短 spot check 我建议就这 2 条： ```bash npm run codex:vscode:gc --silent ```
接下来 我要做蛇呢么？

接下来做这 3 件事就够了。 1. 先留一条最小回归命令 直接用这条做以后 spot check： ```bash npm run codex:vscode:gc --silent ``` 如果怀疑 prompt 没及时落盘，再用： ```bash node scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format markdown --prompt "[GC-D2] 回到编辑器问题。…
或者补一个 repo 内可重复的 smoke/eval case，把 GC-D2 收进固定回归
已经补进去了。 新回归 case 在： - [evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js)
已经修到全绿了。 我做了两件事： - 把 Codex minor GC 默认允许的 guarded relation 放宽到包含 `continue` - 把 `codex-minor-gc-current-editor-update-after-detour` 收进固定 live eval case

decision.archive_summary: Resolved editor/GC detour and follow-up regression work. Confirmed default editor was Zed after rerunning GC-D2. Established minimal spot-check commands around `npm run codex:vscode:gc --silent` and fallback prompt rerun. Added a repeatable repo smoke/eval case for GC-D2 in `evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js`. Final fix made live evals green by allowing guarded relation `continue` and adding `codex-minor-gc-current-editor-update-after-detour` as a fixed live eval case.
decision.reasoning_summary: The active topic appears resolved by the assistant’s final status report after the user’s brief confirmation/request. No unresolved task remains in the transcript, and there are no clear durable user preferences or facts here that need semantic pinning. Earlier status snapshots and solved implementation details are good eviction candidates, so only the latest user turn needs to remain in the next-turn prompt.
